name: LinearGraphGenerator
javadoc:
/**
 * Generates a linear graph of any size. For a directed graph, the edges are
 * oriented from START_VERTEX to END_VERTEX.
 *
 * @author John V. Sichi
 * @since Sep 16, 2003
 */

members.name: LinearGraphGenerator
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Construct a new LinearGraphGenerator.
 *
 * @param size number of vertices to be generated
 *
 * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the specified size is negative.
 */

tags.name: size
tags.content: number of vertices to be generated

tags.content: if the specified size is negative.
